# Generated API Client and Schemas

This directory contains auto-generated TypeScript types and Zod schemas from the OpenAPI specification.

**DO NOT EDIT** these files manually. They will be overwritten on the next generation.

## Files

- `openapi.json` - OpenAPI specification (cached from API)
- `api-client.ts` - TypeScript API client with type-safe methods (generated by NSwag)
- `zod-schemas.ts` - Zod validation schemas for runtime type checking (generated by openapi-zod-client)

## Generate

To regenerate these files:

```bash
pnpm generate:api
```

See [API Code Generation Guide](../../../../docs/02-development/api-code-generation.md) for more information.
